scripts.ci:contracts: cd contracts && ([ -d lib/forge-std/src ] || forge install foundry-rs/forge-std@v1.9.6 --no-git) && ([ -d lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts ] || forge install OpenZeppelin/openzeppelin-contracts@v5.0.2 --no-git) && forge build
scripts.ci:local: pnpm check && pnpm ci:contracts && pnpm --filter web-app build
scripts.setup-env: cp web-app/.env.example web-app/.env && cp contracts/.env.example contracts/.env && cp backend/.env.example backend/.env
